title: [Catacombs, Tunnel]
description: Along the back wall a huge patch of skin, with matted fur still attached, clings to a jagged spot of rocks.

Along the back wall a huge patch of skin, with matted fur still attached, clings to a jagged spot of rocks.  There is no trace of the wounded animal.  In the distance, the high-pitched metallic ping of hundreds of bats echo and bounce off the walls.  The vibrations cause a small avalanche of dirt and other debris.

wayto.10476: ;e move 'go niche';while Room.current.id == 5922;line = get?;if line.nil?;sleep 0.2;elsif line == 'Your eyes have recovered from the poor light within the niche.';move 'go niche';break;end;end;
